title: Atlanta Outdoor Murder Mystery 2: Crime on Date Night
location: Peachtree St NE @ 10th St NE, Downtown Atlanta, GA
description: Outdoor interactive murder mystery built specifically for couples. Walkable downtown route, solve-it-together energy — perfect playful first or 50th date.

title: Sip & Sculpt Pottery Workshop @ Casa Bembé
location: Casa Bembé Cuban Restaurant, Atlanta, GA
description: Wednesday-night couples pottery at a Cuban restaurant — sip, sculpt, and eat tapas after. Low-stakes creative first date.

title: SOLARA: Return to the Light — Summer Group Exhibition Opening
location: 404FoundATL, Atlanta, GA
description: Free art exhibition opening celebrating Atlanta's creative community. Low-key browse-and-mingle first-date energy with drinks flowing.

title: Afrobeats to the World — Atlanta
location: The Masquerade – Heaven, Underground Atlanta, 75 MLK Jr Dr SW, Atlanta, GA
description: Big Friday-night Afrobeats party at The Masquerade. International crowd, heavy DJs, dancefloor. Wear something cute, lose your voice.

title: Salsa at Politan Row at Colony Square
location: Politan Row at Colony Square, Midtown Atlanta, GA
description: Outdoor salsa + bachata social with food-hall steps away. Easy afternoon-into-evening couple's flow, beginners welcome.

title: R&B & Rosé Brunch & Day Party at Seven Midtown
location: Seven Midtown, 1100 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA
description: 4th of July R&B + rosé day party in Midtown. Daytime dancing, easy walk to Centennial Park fireworks after.

title: Stars, Sips & Skyline — 4th of July Rooftop Celebration
location: Kimpton Sylvan Atlanta – Buckhead, GA
description: Buckhead rooftop with skyline views for the fireworks. Cocktails, sunset, sparkle — the dress-up date night.

title: Stone Mountain Park 4th of July Fireworks
time: Gates late afternoon, fireworks after dark
location: Stone Mountain Park, 1000 Robert E Lee Blvd, Stone Mountain, GA
description: Atlanta's biggest 4th fireworks show. Bring a blanket, picnic, make it a long sunset-to-fireworks date.

title: Rum Punch Fest — Reggae on the Rooftop (4th of July Weekend)
location: Cafe Circa Rooftop, 464 Edgewood Ave SE, Atlanta, GA
description: Rooftop reggae + Afrobeats + soca. Skyline view, late-night energy — the loudest 4th of July date in town.

title: Couples Connection: A Mind-Body Experience
location: Infinite Growth Counseling & Coaching LLC, Atlanta, GA
description: Yoga + breathwork + partner-based exercises designed for couples. Sweat together, laugh together, leave closer.

title: Glow Nights After Hours — Georgia Aquarium
location: Georgia Aquarium, 225 Baker St NW, Atlanta, GA
description: 18+ after-hours aquarium with DJ + cocktails + glowing tanks. Built-in conversation starter for a first or 50th date.

title: Na'im Lynn at Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 3070 Windward Plaza, Alpharetta, GA
description: Friday night comedy. Easy dinner-then-laughs date up in Alpharetta — pair with a downtown Alpharetta stroll after.

title: ATL Greenhouse — Free House Music Day in Piedmont Park
location: Piedmont Park – The Pavilion, Atlanta, GA
description: All-day free house-music festival at the Pavilion — vendors, food, drinks, lawn games. Bring blankets, picnic all day, dance into the night.

title: Atlanta's Afro Caribbean Fest
location: Atlanta, GA (see listing)
description: Afro-Caribbean culture fest — soca, reggae, Afrobeats, food, dance. Cultural date day that'll get you both moving.

title: Savanna Nights — 2000s Era at Zoo Atlanta
location: Zoo Atlanta, 800 Cherokee Ave SE, Atlanta, GA
description: Adults-only zoo night with throwback 2000s soundtrack, animal encounters, cocktails. Costumes and singalongs welcome.

title: Saxophonist Jessy J — Dinner & A Show
location: Perfect Note Atlanta, Atlanta, GA
description: Smooth-jax dinner + show format. VIP seats up front, GA behind. Built-in romantic pairing — order dinner, sip wine, get serenaded.

title: Na'im Lynn at Helium Comedy Club — Saturday Late Show
location: Helium Comedy Club, 3070 Windward Plaza, Alpharetta, GA
description: Second night of Na'im Lynn — the late show is the loose, raunchier set. Date-night upgrade: dinner in Alpharetta + comedy.

title: ATL Vegan Festival — Piedmont Park
location: Piedmont Park, 1071 Piedmont Ave NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Plant-based food festival in the park. Lazy Sunday date: vendors, samples, picnic blanket, dogs welcome.

title: Life Space Vegan Chef Cook-Off
location: 294 Hamilton E Holmes Dr NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Vegan chef cook-off — small, intimate, foodie date energy. Pair with ATL Vegan Festival if you're going hard.

title: Prima Materia — Group Exhibition Opening
location: Empire Arts Gallery, Atlanta, GA
description: Group show exploring artistic transformation — 'the sacred beginning of the creative act.' Easy day-of art browse, then lunch.
